bird.name: 花脸山裸鼻雀
bird.summary: 花脸山裸鼻雀（台湾作黑臉山裸鼻雀，学名：Tephrophilus wetmorei），是雀形目唐纳雀科的一种鸟类，属于单型的花脸山裸鼻雀属（学名：Tephrophilus）。 花脸山裸鼻雀体重约62.5克，翼长约99.2毫米，喙宽度约6.8毫米，喙厚度约8毫米，嘴峰长约20.4…

relations.subject: 花脸山裸鼻雀
relations.evidence: The masked mountain tanager is endemic to the high Andes of Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru, where it inhabits mossy forests, moist dwarf forests, grass, bamboo, and mossy scrublands at elevations of
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 花脸山裸鼻雀
relations.evidence: It is generally rare or uncommon, and is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
